LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-23-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND VACATE BAIL FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BOND PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1306(C), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE SURETY AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-23-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $15.00

calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment And Vacate Bail Forfeiture And Exonerate Bond Pursuant To Penal Code 1306(C)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment And Vacate Bail Forfeiture And Exonerate Bond Pursuant To Penal Code 1306(C)

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the surety and real party in interest is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
